tagline: One shoe. Every moment. Made in Egypt.
positioning_statement: For Egyptian women who want design-led, occasion-flexible footwear without a designer price tag, Cielito is the handmade, locally-crafted label that takes you from morning to soirée — the accessible-luxury alternative to both mass-market volume brands and unreachable premium designers.
known_for: Handmade-in-Egypt leather footwear (heels, mules, sandals, boots) at accessible prices, now extending into occasion apparel (kimonos, sets).
differentiation: Local craftsmanship + internationally-sourced materials + an occasion-flexible design philosophy; plus a dormant but press-validated sustainable fruit-leather innovation that no rival owns (revival is a founder-gated decision, D-05).
executive_headline: A brand with a real audience and a real product, separated by a broken owned-content engine — the fastest turnaround in the estate because the assets already exist.
executive_summary: 88,903 Instagram followers and a verified badge, but owned posts earn a median of 3 likes (0.006% engagement, n=17) — while creators tagging the brand reach 5,930 likes and 124,937 views, roughly 190x the owned median. The audience exists; the engine is broken.
The brand markets to Egyptians in English (16 of 17 recent captions) while its own best-performing posts on both Instagram and TikTok are in Egyptian Arabic — a self-inflicted reach penalty.

There is no WhatsApp conversion path anywhere (site, bio, captions) in a market where WhatsApp + cash-on-delivery is the default purchase route, and the brand's own check-on-delivery shipping policy already runs a conversational sales motion.

Identity has drifted: three competing taglines, a press-validated fruit-leather differentiator deleted from every live surface, 128 of 250 SKUs untyped, and 38% of the catalog on permanent discount against a scale leader (Dejavu, 289K followers).
objectives: Repair owned engagement: 10x the owned-post engagement-rate median within 8 weeks by flipping to masri-first, UGC-native and skit formats (measured on new-format posts only).
Install the conversion bridge: WhatsApp CTA live on every surface within 2 weeks; baseline chat-to-order once client shares order data.
Formalize the demand flywheel: a creator-seeding program capturing usage rights, turning ~190x-outperforming earned content into an owned, repeatable system.
Set the identity: one tagline, one hero franchise, and a founder-gated decision on reviving the fruit-leather differentiator.
Make it mobile-ready-for-paid: lift mobile PageSpeed from 55 toward 80 and clean the catalog before any product-feed ad spend.
campaign_objectives: Awareness via earned reach: move the proven UGC/skit formats in-house and amplify the founder channel to rebuild organic reach without paid spend.
Consideration via education: launch a leather-care / how-it's-made / styling pillar that justifies the EGP 1,200 median price under purchasing-power pressure.
Conversion via WhatsApp: route every high-intent moment (try-on questions, offer windows) into a WhatsApp Business catalog.
market_headline: A ~EGP 31.4bn Egyptian footwear market (2025, +9% YoY) where women are 52% of demand, e-commerce is still under-penetrated (~90% offline), and local, affordable, socially-native brands are the ones taking share.
market_situation: Egypt footwear retail value ~EGP 31.4bn in 2025, +9% YoY (a USD-denominated source cites ~$635M — the two are not reconciled; treated as ESTIMATE_ONLY and banded, never a single settled figure).
Women's footwear ~52% of the market; women also over-index in online fashion buying influenced by social trends.
E-commerce headroom is large: offline still ~90% of footwear retail, so a social-to-DTC brand is fishing in an under-penetrated pool.
Purchasing-power erosion is the principal demand risk — which makes discount discipline and demonstrable value (craft, durability) strategically important, not optional.
Local brands (Dejavu, Shoe Room, Pixie) are named by analysts as share-gainers on affordability + local-made preference + heavy social presence.

competitors.name: Dejavu
competitors.positioning: Egypt's leading mass-market footwear & bags brand — scale and ubiquity
competitors.channels: Instagram (289K), Facebook (~2.3M likes), online + physical stores
competitors.content_style: High-frequency product + styling reels, trend-led, Arabic-forward

competitors.name: Jayda Hany
competitors.positioning: Designer-led premium footwear & accessories (AUC + London College of Fashion pedigree)

competitors.name: Bulga
competitors.positioning: Heritage/artisan handcrafted footwear with cultural-craft narrative

competitors.name: Ramla
competitors.positioning: Ethical handmade leather mules/loafers; Vogue Arabia featured

competitors.name: Achilles / CHOU / Shoe Room / Pixie
competitors.positioning: Mid-market Egyptian online footwear peers competing on trend + price

social_listening.summary: Captured across owned + earned Instagram (n=60 mixed, 17 owned) and TikTok (n=60). The signal is unambiguous: the brand's audience responds to Arabic entertainment and real-person UGC, and ignores English product-push — but the brand keeps producing the latter.

findings.label: Arabic outperforms English
findings.note: The single Arabic owned IG caption is the top owned post (39 likes vs median 3); TikTok top-3 includes 'باشا مصر' at 14,800 plays vs 1,220 median.

findings.label: UGC ~190x owned
findings.note: Earned peak 5,930 likes / 124,937 views vs owned median 3 likes / 655 views; 12+ creators tag the brand in a 60-post window including the founder (8 posts).

findings.label: Skit format is the winner
findings.note: The recurring 'تسنيم' named-character workplace skit is the best-performing repeatable format across both platforms — a franchisable content engine already invented and under-used.

findings.label: TikTok effort without return
findings.note: 584 videos posted for 7,608 followers (13 followers/video); median 0 comments — output is high, strategy is absent, identity is mixed with founder-journey content.

findings.label: Zero conversion language
findings.note: Across 17 owned captions: 0 WhatsApp CTAs and 0 offer language, while the site runs 38% discounting and B1G1 mechanics — the commercial engine never reaches social.

findings.label: Comment volume is thin
findings.note: Owned median 2 comments — limited verbatim VoC available; itself a finding (low conversational depth), and a reason to build comment-driving formats.

positioning_map.white_space: Design-led + accessible + a sustainability/innovation story (fruit leather) — currently unoccupied by the rival set at mid-price.

segments.name: The Occasion Planner
segments.who: Egyptian woman 25-40, urban (Cairo/Alex), event-driven wardrobe, active on IG
segments.care: One versatile shoe that works morning-to-soirée; not looking identical to everyone else
segments.motivation: Status-appropriate style without a designer bill
segments.message: جزمة واحدة تكفّي مشاويرك كلها — من الصبح للسهرة

segments.name: The Modest-Fashion Stylist
segments.who: Hijabi woman 20-35 building looks around kimonos/sets (hashtag evidence: #hijabers, kimono is the largest catalog family)
segments.care: Coordinated full looks, coverage + trend, shareable outfits
segments.message: اللوك الكامل من الكيمونو للجزمة — Cielito

segments.name: The Value-Conscious Quality Seeker
segments.who: Woman 25-45 under purchasing-power pressure who still wants leather that lasts
segments.motivation: Smart spending — pay once, wear for years
segments.message: جلد طبيعي، صنع مصري، وتقدري تشوفيه قبل ما تدفعي

segments.name: The Founder-Story Follower
segments.who: Followers of Lolwa Awad's personal account + press readers who know the origin story
segments.care: Backing a local female-founded brand with a point of view
segments.message: من فكرة لولوة لجزمة في رجلك — صناعة مصرية بحب

opportunities: Formalize the UGC flywheel that already outperforms owned content ~190x into a contracted creator program with usage rights (near-zero media cost).
Flip to masri-first content — the brand's own data proves Arabic wins; this is a free reach uplift.
Install WhatsApp commerce to capture the highest-intent traffic in the market's default purchase channel.
Revive the press-validated fruit-leather / vegan-innovation line as a premium 'Cielito Verde' capsule — the only differentiator no rival owns.
Franchise a hero product (the named 'Mariposa' cowboy boot instinct) to build recall the flat catalog currently lacks.
Own the education space (leather care, how-it's-made, sizing) — empty across the rival set and a trust builder under price pressure.
threats: Purchasing-power erosion compressing discretionary fashion spend across the market.
Dejavu's scale (289K IG / ~2.3M FB) and discount cadence setting a price-war tempo Cielito cannot win on volume.
Continued commodity drift: 38% discount surface + no stated differentiator trains customers to wait for sales and erodes margin.
Platform dependency + a possibly-degraded 89K follower base (G-03) — if the audience is dormant/low-quality, paid lookalikes built on it will misfire.
Imported-materials FX exposure raising COGS in an EGP-volatile environment.
content_tracks: Entertainment (Arabic skit series — the proven engine)
Product-in-context (UGC-native styling, real people, real settings)
Education & proof (leather care, how-it's-made, check-on-delivery, reviews)

content_pillars.name: Yalla Cielito (Entertainment)
content_pillars.purpose: Rebuild reach with the brand's best-performing format
content_pillars.examples: تسنيم workplace skits, 'باشا مصر' cultural moments, situational comedy ending in a product reveal

content_pillars.name: The Look (Product-in-context)
content_pillars.purpose: Show the shoe/outfit on real people in real occasions
content_pillars.examples: UGC reposts (with permission), creator styling, morning-to-soirée transitions

content_pillars.name: Made to Last (Education & Proof)
content_pillars.purpose: Justify the price and build trust under purchasing-power pressure
content_pillars.examples: Leather care, how-it's-made (Egyptian hands), 'ليه بـ1200؟' price anatomy, check-on-delivery explainer, review walls

content_pillars.name: The Cielito Woman (Brand & Founder)
content_pillars.purpose: Give the brand a face and a why
content_pillars.examples: Founder origin story, values, behind-the-scenes, Cielito Verde sustainability story

content_pillars.name: Drops & Windows (Offer, disciplined)
content_pillars.purpose: Concentrate commercial pushes into evidenced demand windows only
content_pillars.examples: Ramadan/Eid capsules, summer/Sahel, winter boots, always paired with proof content

pillar_implementation: Feed mix target: 30% Entertainment / 25% The Look / 20% Made to Last / 15% The Cielito Woman / 10% Drops & Windows.
Caption rule: masri Egyptian Arabic first line, concise English second line; premium capsules may lead English.
Every product post carries a WhatsApp CTA ('اطلبي عالواتساب') and links to a clean, typed collection.

channels.Instagram: Primary brand stage — Reels-led, UGC reposts, WhatsApp bio link, highlights restructured to Shop / Reviews / How-it's-made / Size guide.
channels.TikTok: Entertainment + reach engine — masri skits and product-entertainment ONLY; founder-journey content moves off the brand handle.
channels.WhatsApp Business: The conversion bridge — catalog synced from Shopify, order + try-on + broadcast; the missing piece of the funnel.
channels.Facebook: Under-instrumented (G-02) but likely where Arabic mass-market demand lives (Dejavu's ~2.3M FB) — audit before deciding weight.
channels.Founder account (@awadlolwa): Official secondary channel — origin story, values, behind-the-scenes; cross-tags the brand.

funnel.note: Arabic skits + UGC/creator reach + founder amplification (organic-first; the 89K base is re-activation, not the acquisition engine until G-03 is answered).
Education pillar (care, how-it's-made, price anatomy) + review/UGC proof; clean typed catalog for browsing.
WhatsApp CTA on every surface -> WhatsApp Business catalog -> COD / check-on-delivery close; mobile-fast PDP.
Post-purchase care content, seasonal drops, size-fit confidence, exchange-friendly policy; repeat-purchase nudges via WhatsApp broadcast (opt-in).
Parcel-insert UGC brief -> customer becomes creator -> repost slot; ambassador tier for top creators.

offers.offer: Free styling / 'which shoe are you' interactive content (no discount)
The Full Look bundle (shoe + bag / kimono + mule) at a modest bundle price
offers.monetizes: AOV uplift without margin-killing sitewide discounts

offers.offer: WhatsApp-first drops: early access to new collections for WhatsApp subscribers
Seasonal capsule windows (Ramadan/Eid/summer/winter) with disciplined, time-boxed promos
offers.monetizes: Repeat purchase in proven demand windows

fast_track: Add wa.me link to Instagram bio + site header (days, near-zero cost) — D-02.
Flip caption default to masri Egyptian Arabic and re-run the 'تسنيم' skit series — D-03.
DM the 12 captured creators to formalize permission + reposting — D-01.
One-day Shopify hygiene sprint: type SKUs, merge duplicate collections, fix inverted compare-at prices — D-03.
standout: The only rival-set gap is design-led + accessible + sustainable-innovation — Cielito is the sole brand with a press-validated claim (fruit leather) to occupy it.
Turn the shipping policy into marketing: 'check before you pay' is a trust superpower in a COD market and is currently unmarketed.
Franchise a named hero (Mariposa boots) so the brand becomes recognizable, not just another catalog.
Founder-as-face: an articulate LSE-to-shoes origin story is rare in the category and already producing content.

days_0_15: WhatsApp link live on IG bio + site header + TikTok bio (D-02).
Caption language flip to masri; brief and shoot 4 skit episodes (D-03).
Creator permission DMs to the 12 captured handles; draft usage-rights template (D-01).
days_16_30: Shopify hygiene sprint: type 128 SKUs, merge dup collections, fix inverted prices (D-03).
Mobile PageSpeed sprint kickoff: image compression + app/script audit (D-04).
days_31_45: Ambassador program v1 live with usage-rights capture; parcel-insert UGC brief (D-01).
WhatsApp Business catalog synced from Shopify; first WhatsApp-subscriber drop.
Highlights restructure + bio rewrite around one tagline (D-05 interim).
days_46_60: Founder decision session on fruit-leather revival + tagline lock (D-05, needs G-04).
Paid-ads readiness check (WhatsApp path + mobile >=70 + 3 proven creatives); pilot retargeting only.
Baseline the KPI covenant against first tranche of client order data (G-01).

measurement_chain.instrument: IG/TikTok Insights (reach, plays) on new-format posts
measurement_chain.metric: Reach per post; owned engagement-rate median (baseline 0.006%)

measurement_chain.instrument: Saves, shares, profile visits, link taps

measurement_chain.metric: Chats/week; chat-to-order rate (to be baselined, G-01)
Repeat-purchase rate; drop open/click (to be baselined)
UGC velocity (creators/month); earned reach vs owned ratio (baseline ~190:1)

final_recommendations: Sequence for cost-to-impact: WhatsApp bridge (days) -> catalog hygiene + masri flip (2 weeks) -> creator program (weeks) -> mobile perf (parallel) -> founder-gated positioning.

Do NOT buy paid traffic until the WhatsApp path, mobile PageSpeed >=70, catalog hygiene, and 3 proven organic creatives are in place — and never build lookalikes on the 89K base until its quality is audited (G-03).
Treat earned/UGC as the primary demand engine and owned-feed as a re-activation + proof surface, not the growth driver.
Make the founder-gated call on fruit leather within 60 days — it is the only defensible differentiator captured and it already earned unpaid national press.
Request Shopify + analytics access so the next wave converts every 'to be baselined' into an ROI scenario.
rationale: Every recommendation is anchored to a HELD capture, not a benchmark import: the engagement collapse, the language signal, the missing WhatsApp path, and the catalog mess are all in the primary data.

The plan is deliberately organic-first because the assets (audience, UGC flywheel, founder, catalog) already exist — the constraint is the engine, not the raw material, which makes this a fast, low-spend turnaround.
Discount discipline and value-education are prioritized because market data flags purchasing-power erosion as the principal demand risk — winning on price against Dejavu is not viable.
WhatsApp is sequenced first because it is the market's default conversion channel, near-zero cost, and the brand's own operations already run a conversational motion.
master_visuals: Owned-vs-earned engagement bar (3 likes vs 5,930) — the one chart that wins the pitch.
The funnel with the WhatsApp gap highlighted in red.
Positioning map with Cielito's drift arrow from 'today' to 'target'.
moodboard: Warm Egyptian daylight, terracotta and sand tones, real hands crafting leather.
Occasion contrast: same shoe in a morning café and an evening rooftop (morning-to-soirée).
UGC-native texture — phone-shot authenticity over glossy studio, to match what actually performs.
palette_rationale: Anchor on a warm, elevated-but-accessible palette — terracotta/tan (leather + Egyptian earth), soft cream (premium-but-approachable), a deep accent (charcoal or oxblood) for contrast and 'affordable luxury' signaling. Avoids Dejavu's high-saturation mass-market look; leans design-led without going cold-premium. (Provisional — to be locked against actual brand assets on image review.)
font_direction: A refined serif for the wordmark/headlines (craft + timelessness) paired with a clean humanist Arabic-Latin sans for captions and UI, with strong native Arabic type support since content flips masri-first. (Provisional pending visual review.)

next_steps: Build the hero 360 dashboard (esm-landing /dashboard/cielito-360) from this strategy.json — the WOM pitch centerpiece.
Approve the data-pass menu routes (Facebook stats, rival socials, follower-quality audit) to close G-02/G-03/G-07.
Request client Shopify + analytics access to convert 'to be baselined' cards into ROI scenarios (G-01).
Book the 60-minute founder session to resolve fruit-leather status + tagline lock (G-04).
confidence_note: Diagnosis grades HELD on primary captures (site, 250-SKU catalog, IG/TikTok scrapes, PageSpeed + agent-readiness instruments). Market sizing is ESTIMATE_ONLY (two sources conflict, banded). Founder + fruit-leather history is LIKELY (two press sources); its removal from live messaging is HYPOTHESIS. Follower-base quality (G-03) and all revenue/conversion figures (G-01) are GAPs — every financial figure is labeled 'to be baselined'. Social metrics disclose n= and capture window throughout; no metric is fabricated and no absence is claimed from a blocked route.
